tags.name: `mc-typeahead`
tags.description:
Purpose: A typeahead (autocomplete) component that provides real-time suggestions as users type into an input field.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to provide users with suggestions based on their input.
When not to use: When you have a fixed set of options that do not change based on user input.
Works with components: mc-option, mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names: Autocomplete, Search Suggestions, Predictive Search, Smart Search, Dropdown Search, Filtered Select

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is going out of focus.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-input click.

  * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed.

  * `clearbuttonclick` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when the clear button is pressed.

  * `search` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Fires when user starts typing (after specified number of minchar and debounce).

  * `optionselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fires when an option is selected.

  * `listscroll` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when user scrolls to the bottom of the list.

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-input.

Attributes:

  * `minchars` {`number`} - 

  * `debounce` {`number`} - 

  * `highlight` {`boolean`} - 

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `disablefilter` {`boolean`} - 

  * `data` {`IMcTypeaheadData[] | null`} - Array of objects with label and value properties, to be used as options for the typeahead.

  * `maxoptions` {`number`} - Sets the max number of options to be displayed.

  * `nosuggestions` {`string`} - For displaying no suggestions label where no match was found.

  * `showlistonfocus` {`boolean`} - Show initial list with items on user input focused. It could be a list pf "previous searches" or "most popular items".

  * `listlabel` {`string`} - Show label for the initial list with items on user input focused. If empty, the label will not be shown.

  * `optionswidth` {`string`} - Sets the max width od the popup list with options.

  * `optionsheight` {`string`} - Sets the max height of the popup list with options.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Sets the popover open on initial render.

  * `infinitescroll` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will dispatch `scroll` event when the user scrolls to the bottom of the list.

  * `matchlabelonly` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will match the label only (not the sublabel or value).

Properties:

  * `dispatchSearchEvent` - 

  * `setItemFocus` - 

  * `lastScrollTop` {`number | null`} - 

  * `lastFocusedItemIndex` {`number`} - 

  * `selectedOptions` {`IMcSelectOption | IMcSelectOption[] | null | undefined`} - 

  * `labelSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `sublabelSelector` {`string`} - 

  * `actionkeys` {`never[]`} - 

  * `ariaExpanded` {`"true" | "false"`} - 

  * `ariaLiveMessage` {`string`} - 

  * `inferredData` {`IMcTypeaheadData[] | null`} - 

  * `fullScreen` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasInitValue` {`boolean`} - 

  * `isActive` {`boolean`} - 

  * `internalLoadingState` {`boolean | null | undefined`} - 

  * `currentGroup` {`string | null`} - 

  * `visibleOptions` {`IMcTypeaheadData[] | null`} - 

  * `mcList` {`IMcList | undefined`} - 

  * `modalBody` {`HTMLDivElement | undefined`} - 

  * `mcPopover` {`IMcPopover | undefined`} - 

  * `mcOptions` {`IMcSelectOption[] | NodeList | undefined`} - 

  * `slotElements` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `minchars` {`number`} - 

  * `debounce` {`number`} - 

  * `highlight` {`boolean`} - 

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `disablefilter` {`boolean`} - 

  * `handleInputClick` - 

  * `setFullScreen` - 

  * `keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - 

  * `data` {`IMcTypeaheadData[] | null`} - Array of objects with label and value properties, to be used as options for the typeahead.

  * `maxoptions` {`number`} - Sets the max number of options to be displayed.

  * `nosuggestions` {`string`} - For displaying no suggestions label where no match was found.

  * `showlistonfocus` {`boolean`} - Show initial list with items on user input focused. It could be a list pf "previous searches" or "most popular items".

  * `listlabel` {`string`} - Show label for the initial list with items on user input focused. If empty, the label will not be shown.

  * `optionswidth` {`string`} - Sets the max width od the popup list with options.

  * `optionsheight` {`string`} - Sets the max height of the popup list with options.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Sets the popover open on initial render.

  * `infinitescroll` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will dispatch `scroll` event when the user scrolls to the bottom of the list.

  * `dsisablefilter` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to true, the typeahead will not use the build-in internal search filter function to match results.
It will relay on the app to provide the filtered data from i.e. Rest API.

  * `customfilter` - Custom filter function to be used to filter the options instead of using the build-in filter function.
The internal filter function matches any text at any position in label, sublabel and value.
It will be called with the input value and the option value and should return an array of strings.

  * `matchlabelonly` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will match the label only (not the sublabel or value).

  * `search` - Custom event emitted on user starts typing in the input (sends the whole option item as detail).

  * `optionselected` - Custom event emitted on option selected (sends the whole option item as detail).
In multiselect mode, sends an array of selected options.

  * `listscroll` - Custom event emitted on when the user scrolls to the bottom of the list

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -

Default: 1

Property: infinitescroll

`matchlabelonly` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will match the label only (not the sublabel or value).

Property: matchlabelonly

Default: false
